summary: Tested TQS Engine Phase 2 implementation. All 39 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend loads correctly with live market data, charts, and all UI components functioning. TQS provides unified 0-100 scoring with 5 weighted pillars working as expected.

pillars_endpoint.details: Returns all 5 pillars with correct weights (setup 25%, technical 25%, fundamental 15%, context 20%, execution 15%) and component lists.

thresholds_endpoint.details: Returns correct action thresholds (STRONG_BUY>=80, BUY>=65, HOLD>=50, AVOID>=35, STRONG_AVOID<35) and grade ranges (A 85+, B+ 75-84, B 65-74, C+ 55-64, C 45-54, D 35-44, F 0-34). Weights sum to 1.0.

score_endpoint.details: Returns TQS summary with score (0-100), grade, action, and pillar_scores. Tested with AAPL, MSFT, TSLA. Example: AAPL bull_flag long -> score 59.3, grade C+, action HOLD.

breakdown_endpoint.details: Returns detailed breakdown with all 5 pillar components, raw values, factors, key_factors, concerns, and warnings. Each pillar returns correct component scores.

batch_endpoint.details: Batch scoring multiple opportunities works correctly. Results sorted by score descending. Handles empty list and enforces 50 item limit.

guidance_endpoint.details: Returns trading guidance (action, confidence, sizing, guidance text) for any score. Correct recommendations at all threshold boundaries.

pillar_components.details: Each pillar returns correct component scores: Setup (pattern, win_rate, expected_value, tape, smb), Technical (trend, rsi, levels, volatility, volume), Fundamental (catalyst, short_interest, float, institutional, earnings), Context (regime, time, sector, vix, day), Execution (history, tilt, entry_tendency, exit_tendency, streak).

grade_assignment.details: Grades correctly assigned based on score ranges.

action_assignment.details: Actions correctly assigned based on thresholds.

frontend_load.details: Frontend loads correctly with live market data (SPY, QQQ, DIA, IWM), charts, AI Assistant, Portfolio Insights, Scanner Alerts, and Earnings Calendar.

critical_code_review_comments: TQS Engine correctly implements weighted scoring system with 5 pillars summing to 100%
All pillar services use graceful degradation with sensible defaults when data unavailable
Batch endpoint properly limits to 50 opportunities and sorts results by score
Grade and action assignment logic matches documented thresholds
Router properly validates query parameters and returns structured responses
seed_data_creation: None - TQS uses graceful degradation with defaults when no historical data available
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2 TQS Engine is complete. All 6 API endpoints working correctly (/api/tqs/pillars, /api/tqs/thresholds, /api/tqs/score/{symbol}, /api/tqs/breakdown/{symbol}, POST /api/tqs/batch, /api/tqs/guidance). Services use default values when real data unavailable. Phase 1 Learning Infrastructure provides trader profile data to execution quality pillar.
